---
title: "Tesing simple hypothesis using the Boltzmann Test"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Tesing simple hypothesis using the Boltzmann Test}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(boltzmannTest)
```


## One-sample test of the mean

## Two-sample test of the mean
### paired
### unpaired


## Testing the means of more than two groups


## One-sample test of a rate

## Two-sample test of a rate
### paired
### unpaired

## Testing the rates of more than two groups
